phrases.intent_en: Ask how to access Alcazaba fortress
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cómo se accede a la Alcazaba desde aquí?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, KOH-moh seh ak-SEH-deh ah lah al-kah-SAH-bah DEHS-deh ah-KEE?

likely_response.local: Compre entrada general y siga la ruta marcada hacia arriba.
likely_response.pronunciation: KOHMP-reh ehnt-RAH-dah heh-neh-RAHL Y SEE-gah LAH ROO-tah mahr-KAH-dah ah-THEE-ah ahr-REE-bah
likely_response.translation_en: Buy general ticket and follow the marked route upwards.

responses.english: Buy general ticket and follow the marked route upwards.
responses.phonetic: KOHMP-reh ehnt-RAH-dah heh-neh-RAHL Y SEE-gah LAH ROO-tah mahr-KAH-dah ah-THEE-ah ahr-REE-bah
responses.french: Compre entrada general y siga la ruta marcada hacia arriba.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Nasrid Palaces entrance is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la entrada a los Palacios Nazaríes?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah ehn-TRAH-dah ah lohs pah-LAH-syohs nah-sah-REE-ehs?

likely_response.local: Cruce el Patio de los Arrayanes, al fondo.
likely_response.pronunciation: KROO-theh EHL pah-TEE-oh DEH LOHS ahr-rah-YAH-nehs AHL FOHN-doh
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs towards the Nasrid Palaces.

responses.english: Follow the signs towards the Nasrid Palaces.
responses.phonetic: KROO-theh EHL pah-TEE-oh DEH LOHS ahr-rah-YAH-nehs AHL FOHN-doh
responses.french: Cruce el Patio de los Arrayanes, al fondo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pick up audio guide
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo recoger la audioguía del monumento?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh PWEH-doh rreh-koh-HEHR lah ow-dee-oh-GEE-ah del moh-noo-MEHN-toh?

likely_response.local: En la taquilla principal, junto a la entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the main ticket office, next to the entrance.

responses.english: At the main ticket office, next to the entrance.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah preen-thee-PAHL HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah
responses.french: En la taquilla principal, junto a la entrada.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Generalife gardens entrance is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿cómo llego a la entrada del Generalife?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, KOH-moh YEH-goh ah lah ehn-TRAH-dah dehl heh-neh-rah-LEE-feh

likely_response.local: Siga el camino marcado hacia el Generalife.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-gah EHL kah-MEE-noh mahr-KAH-doh ah-THEE-ah EHL heh-neh-rah-LEE-feh
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the marked path towards the Generalife.

responses.english: Follow the marked path towards the Generalife.
responses.phonetic: SEE-gah EHL kah-MEE-noh mahr-KAH-doh ah-THEE-ah EHL heh-neh-rah-LEE-feh
responses.french: Siga el camino marcado hacia el Generalife.
